Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERI


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
MATERIAL_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION TEXT_255_,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIA primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.PRODUCT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the product (events_products_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.MATERIAL_CODE_BK is
'Material Code (events_products_materials_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.MATERIAL_DESCRIPTION is
'Material Description (EN) (events_products_materials_description_en )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.VALID_FROM is
'Hardcoded value ''1900-01-01''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.VALID_TO is
'Hardcoded value ''9999-12-31''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Hardcoded value ''Y''';

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_MATERIALS_CODE

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

Detailed logic in attached query

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

<Undefined>

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_MATERIAL3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
